next_required_actions: Human inspects Testing/PILOT-ISSUE-REVIEW-PACKAGE.md and issue #1 as the representation of Task-0001.
Record the convention decision separating pilot metadata from the final registry/provider model.

Keep queue and priority values out of the repo manifest; the queue/orchestration layer owns those semantics.
Keep TASK-META.json on last_synced_at checkpoint semantics; live text conflict detection comes from fresh GitHub title/body readback before overwrite.
Keep future local-to-GitHub sync on skills/obsidian-operator/scripts/Sync-TaskToGitHubIssue.ps1 so embedded task ids cannot diverge.
